description: Controls the rate at which new lane pages are published to Webflow. Prevents flooding the index with untested content.

waves.label: Pilot
waves.description: Initial 10 pages for validation and indexation monitoring

waves.label: Ramp
waves.description: Expand to 50 pages after Wave 1 pages are indexed and performing

waves.label: Scale
waves.description: Scale to 100 pages with proven templates and archetypes

indexation.description: At least 80% of current wave pages must be indexed and at least 14 days must pass before advancing to the next wave.

killSwitch.description: Set PUBLISH_KILL_SWITCH=true in environment to halt ALL publishing immediately.
